demo.title: scaffold.sh
demo.code:
# No key — writes a new skill folder locally on the locked universal template
# Preview what would be written
node scaffold.mjs --name my-cool-skill --description "Do a cool thing via Replicate" --dry-run

# Generate a full BYO-key skill folder (CLI + SKILL.md + AGENTS.md + skill.json + tool-schema.json + README + LICENSE)
node scaffold.mjs \
  --name my-cool-skill \
  --description "Do a cool thing via Replicate" \
  --model-slug black-forest-labs/flux-schnell --ext webp

setup: No API key — it writes files locally. The factory that produced every MythosForge skill, so each has an identical, drift-free shape.
Preview with `--dry-run` before writing. Generated skills are BYO-key + MIT by default.
